title: Polymarket bets on U.S. marketing blitz to win back trust after 4-year ban: Report
summary: The prediction market's head of U.S. operations says the business is taking steps to legitimize itself after years of legal scrutiny.

title: Crypto Long & Short: With MSTR concerns assuaged, look to traditional signals around BTC
summary: In this week's Crypto Long & Short, FalconX’s Gaspar Martin writes that BTC is reaching a market bottom and is poised for a turnaround.

title: Crypto VC Paradigm launches $1.2 billion AI fund as it broadens beyond digital assets
summary: The firm's latest fund backs AI and robotics startups but leadership says it remains committed to crypto investing.

title: Dinari, tZERO join forces on turnkey platform for tokenized U.S. equities
summary: The move comes as firms race to build the infrastructure for blockchain-based stocks and debate how tokenized stocks should work.

title: Adam Back's BSTR scraps SPAC merger, seeks new deal
summary: BSTR and Cantor Equity Partners will not complete their merger under the original July 2025 agreement, with the shareholder postponed indefinitely.
